productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Double Strap Brown Belt
description: In a simple dual strap style, this sleek leatherette belt from lino perros looks great with denim trousers and dresses. Length: 116 cm Made of leatherette for durability Double straps linked together with metallic loops Leather panels at the buckle and tail for durability Long buckle with a tang clasp and five holes to customise Fit One fixed leather loop to hold the tail in place Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
